purpose: Single machine-readable source of truth binding each skill to its owning department(s), owning specialist role(s), plain-language client-intent triggers, and craft-cluster execution SOP. Feeds Layer A (CC ContextPack dept-scoped skill match), Layer B (role how-to.md 'Skills You Operate' blocks), and Layer C (SKILL_INTENT_ROUTING_REFLEX_V1). See PRD Departments-That-Use-Skills sections 3, 4, 5, 7.

runtime_defaults.note: Matching is dept-scoped: only the task department's owned skills are offered. Rule-Zero paid-call announce + budget cap still apply. Keyword fallback when the client has no OPENAI_API_KEY (same path department-router.ts uses).

notes.client_facing: true = a client can request this in plain language; it carries intent_triggers and resolves to a live owning department + specialist role. These are the intent-routing catalog.
notes.infra: false = install-time / operator / build-time / customer-facing-system skill. Carries a dept_owner for maintenance ownership only; no intent_triggers; excluded from the intent-routing catalog.
notes.roles: Every role slug listed here MUST exist in the role-library _index.json (orphan check enforces this). Default posture: assign to an EXISTING role; NO new roles (PRD section 6).
notes.execution_sops: Pointer(s) under universal-sops/ (craft cluster dir or loose doc). null = no craft playbook for this skill.

skills.name: summarize-youtube
skills.description: Extract YouTube transcripts and produce summaries / key points from a video URL.
intent_triggers: give me the key points of this video

skills.name: humanizer
skills.description: Rewrite AI-generated text to sound natural and human; remove robotic phrasing; match the owner's voice.

skills.name: storyboard-writer
skills.description: Plan video structure against AI model duration limits and generate per-segment prompts (storyboard).

skills.name: video-creator
skills.description: Create videos from text, scripts, images, and clips (text-to-video, image-to-video, assembly, audio mix, export/resize).
intent_triggers: make a video from this text
make a video from this image
turn this script into a video

skills.name: caption-creator
skills.description: Burn professional captions into a video or export an SRT (Whisper + FFmpeg; minimal/full/animated styles).

skills.name: video-editor
skills.description: Local video editing (FFmpeg/yt-dlp/Whisper/PySceneDetect): cut, resize for social, auto-caption, merge B-roll.

skills.name: cinematic-forge
skills.description: End-to-end AI video production concept-to-upload (VEO via KIE.ai, ElevenLabs/Suno audio, FFmpeg assembly).

skills.name: movie-producer
skills.description: Autonomous multi-pipeline video production (OpenMontage): documentary montage or Kie.AI generation, full finished video from a brief.
intent_triggers: produce a full finished video from a brief
make me a whole video end to end

skills.name: social-media-planner
skills.description: Multi-agent content publishing engine: research, create, produce, schedule and publish across enabled GHL social channels.
skills.note: Superseded/rolled into Skill 57 (social-media-in-a-box) for the productionized weekly engine; both remain client-facing.

skills.name: social-media-in-a-box
skills.description: Productionized weekly social engine: takes a weekly theme and runs the full end-to-end social week.
intent_triggers: a full week of posts across all platforms

skills.name: podcast-production-engine
skills.description: Per-client engine that turns one podcast intake survey into one published episode end to end: research, script in the client's Style Engine and Production Mode, Fish Audio s2.1-pro render with the client's own reference_id, Kie.ai cover art, documents, Podbean publish, and Convert and Flow write-back. Owned by the Podcast department. The intake webhook binds sessionKey podcast:intake:<client-slug> to this department's agent so the correct persona picks the job up and it appears on the kanban via the ledger state enum. Full department, persona, and kanban wiring lives in 23-ai-workforce-blueprint/department-wiring/podcast-engine/. Supporting audio roles (podcast-editor, podcast-producer, audio-mastering-specialist) assist at Step 11 and Season-Strategy per that wiring; they are cross-department supporters, not owners, so they are recorded in the wiring spec rather than this owning-roles list.
intent_triggers: turn this intake into a published episode

skills.name: facebook-ad-generator
skills.description: Turns a bio + audience profile into a ready-to-run batch of 10 Facebook & Instagram ads (overlays, bodies, headlines).

skills.name: signature-funnel
skills.description: Builds a Signature Funnel: 12-section Hero copy, per-section image prompts, GHL media + funnel build, configurable 3/5/7-step funnel.

skills.name: email-engine
skills.description: Email Engine + Superlibrary: selects the framework, generates corpus-faithful email copy, QCs it, hands a DRAFT-ONLY deploy plan.

skills.name: signature-presentation
skills.description: Builds a Signature Presentation: 4-phase, minimum-100-slide signature-talk methodology as a governed deck type.

skills.name: design-intelligence-library
skills.description: Design Intelligence Unit: 12-dimension style analysis + style-card library + on-brand image generation.
intent_triggers: generate images in my brand look

skills.name: avatar-alchemist
skills.description: Turns one brand-intake interview into the full brand-intelligence package (40 generators across 7 subsystems).

skills.name: book-writer
skills.description: Turns one book-intake interview into a tone-matched 12-chapter nonfiction book plus companion assets.
intent_triggers: turn my ideas into a book

skills.name: anthology-writer
skills.description: Turns one contributor intake into a finished, gated anthology chapter.
intent_triggers: write my chapter for the anthology

skills.name: anthology-engine
skills.description: Per-client engine that turns one contributor's Convert and Flow intake into one gated, quality-controlled 2,000 to 3,500 word anthology chapter end to end, delivered as both a Google Doc and a 14-point-floor PDF, with links pushed to standardized Convert and Flow contact fields keyed by contact_id, and assembles the whole anthology once every contributor is settled. It owns all external input and output and CALLS Skill 54 (Anthology Writer) as its authoring core; it never re-authors the chapter pipeline. On the FLEET side the skill registers under the books/publishing floor grouping for routing, reusing Skill 54's existing content-marketing-strategist binding (PRD Section 13); the CLIENT-side board identity is instead the seeded Anthology department, a NEW, client-optional department Skill 32's add-department.sh creates per client at provisioning time. It is never one of the 22 mandatory or 6 universal-primary departments and department-naming-map.json is not touched to create it. Full department, persona, and self-invocation wiring lives in 23-ai-workforce-blueprint/department-wiring/anthology-engine/. The two new specialist roles named in PRD Section 13 (anthology-producer-orchestrator, anthology-approvals-steward) are SKILL-BUNDLED role files under 59-anthology-engine/roles/ (landed at WAVE-PLAN W4.2, stamped into 23-ai-workforce-blueprint/persona-matching-protocol.md's Section 13 appendix), the same kind of skill-internal persona as the existing anthology-chapter-author; none of the three is a templates/role-library/_index.json department role, so none of the three is added to this entry's owning-roles list, which stays bound to content-marketing-strategist, the same live role Skill 54 already uses.

skills.name: product-bio
skills.description: Product Bio Engine: turns a 4-field intake into a 6-7k-word, 10-section master-brain product sales knowledge base.
intent_triggers: a master brain for my product

skills.name: sales-page-assets
skills.description: Builds a Direct-Response sales-page asset stack from one survey (the DR sibling of Skill 49).

skills.name: cinematic-web-funnel-engine
skills.description: Builds conversion-focused cinematic websites, landing pages, squeeze pages, sales pages, and multi-step funnels: AI-generated scroll-controlled scene sequences, frame-matched video transitions, a production Next.js site, Vercel deployment, and GoHighLevel/Convert and Flow integration. Delegates protected copy methodologies (Signature Funnel / direct-response) rather than duplicating them; owns cinematic experience planning, media generation, web assembly, scroll runtime, deployment, and cinematic-deliverable QC.
intent_triggers: make my website move as I scroll
build a premium interactive sales page
turn this brand story into a scroll experience
create a Vercel-hosted funnel connected to GoHighLevel
build a cinematic website with complete copy

skills.name: agnes-image
skills.description: Setup/reference: Agnes AI 2.1 Flash synchronous image endpoint (text-to-image and image-to-image; independent Wave-2 API integration, existing AGNES_AI_API_KEY credential).

skills.note: Primarily a delivery rail for funnel/form builds; carries a light client-facing intent for direct GHL form/page requests.

skills.name: zhc-early-warning-system
skills.description: Operator tooling: the fleet Early Warning System - a deterministic, zero-model-call sentinel on every box that detects model/provider drift, furnaces, config-write hygiene, dark surfaces, and cron drift, and hands the operator a one-line revert. Operator-only, client-silent; not a runtime client ask.

skills.name: loop-protection-system
skills.description: Operator tooling: the fleet Loop Protection System - a deterministic, zero-model-call, host-level watchdog that detects crash-loops and token furnaces (D1 restart velocity, D2 idle token-burn, D3 repeated-identical-signature, D4 timer re-fire/wedge/orphan-port), trips circuit breakers, and applies proven reversible kill cards or escalates to Rescue Rangers. Consumes Skill 60's ledger read-only; operated by openclaw-maintenance + Healer + Bugs. Operator-only, client-silent; not a runtime client ask.
